name: dragon's lair
hints: The dragon's lair! An old dragon guards a star. Be very careful.
The dragon is old but still dangerous. You may need a spell to pacify or defeat it before taking the star.
Use the Dizzy Dean spell or other magic on the dragon. GET STAR after dealing with the dragon. UP returns to the plain room.
notes: Dragon's lair with an old dragon and a *STAR*. Accessed by PUSH DOWN from the plain room (10). The dragon must be dealt with (spells, etc.) before safely taking the star. Up returns to the plain room.
